     Source: claude-plugin-harness-best-practices-en.md § 4.9.

#### Error Message Reference

| Error Message | Cause | Fix |
|---------------|-------|-----|
| `File not found: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json` | Wrong file location | Create it inside `.claude-plugin/` |
| `Invalid JSON syntax` | JSON syntax error | Check commas and quotes |
| `Duplicate plugin name "x"` | Two plugins share the same name | Make all names unique |
| `plugins[0].source: Path contains ".."` | Path traversal attempt | Write relative paths without `../` |
| `YAML frontmatter failed to parse` | Invalid YAML in skill/agent | Fix frontmatter syntax |
| `Invalid JSON syntax` (hooks.json) | Malformed hooks.json | Fix the JSON |
